overall.description: Third-person gameplay footage from a video game showing a character walking through a rainy cyberpunk-inspired urban environment at night. The character passes a red-lit punk rock storefront, continues past a modern bank building as rain begins to fall, and walks along a waterfront promenade lined with benches and trees.

scene_state.functional_zone: narrow commercial street with punk rock storefront

agents.ego_description: walking steadily along the wet sidewalk, approaching and observing the red-lit punk rock storefront with mannequins

notable_agents.action: pedestrian in dark clothing walking past the character in the opposite direction

entered.detail: storefront with bright red neon lighting, checkered pattern, and punk rock mannequins in window
illuminated ATM screen displaying £77m jackpot advertisement
wall covered in graffiti including skull art and 'Punks Not Dead' text
tall modern glass skyscraper with blue illuminated windows visible in the distance
overturned trash bins and debris scattered on the sidewalk

segments.scene_description: The character walks along a narrow commercial street at night, passing by a vividly lit punk rock storefront with red neon lights and graffiti-covered walls. The wet concrete sidewalk reflects the artificial lighting, and a pedestrian walks past in the opposite direction.

events.description: rain begins to fall, creating visible droplets and wetting the character's jacket
passing from narrow commercial street to open plaza area with Quan Bank entrance

agents.ego_description: walking through light rain past the modern bank building, heading toward the waterfront promenade

entered.detail: modern bank building with illuminated yellow 'Quan Bank' signage and glass entrance
vertical digital advertisement screen on the sidewalk
elevated walkway or bridge with blue neon lighting underneath
metal railing along the edge of the waterway

segments.scene_description: Rain begins to fall as the character leaves the narrow commercial street, entering a more open plaza area with cobblestone paving. The Quan Bank building with its distinctive illuminated signage becomes prominent on the right, while the character approaches a waterfront promenade.

scene_state.functional_zone: waterfront promenade with benches and trees

events.description: entering the waterfront promenade area with benches, railings, and park lighting
path curves gently to the left as the character enters the tree-lined park section

agents.ego_description: walking steadily along the waterfront path, passing pedestrians seated on benches in the rain

notable_agents.action: person sitting on a concrete bench along the waterfront railing

entered.detail: concrete benches placed along the waterfront path where people are sitting
deciduous trees lining the left side of the path with autumn foliage
parked white commercial van on the street side
modern street lamps illuminating the waterfront path

segments.scene_description: The character walks along a wide waterfront promenade in the rain, passing by benches where people sit and modern street lamps. The path transitions into a more park-like setting with trees lining the route, while the canal railing runs along the right side and the street with parked vehicles is on the left.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement through a neon-lit commercial district that gradually opens into a rainy waterfront promenade. It begins on a narrow street, passing a punk rock storefront with vivid red neon lights and graffiti-covered walls reflecting off the wet concrete. As the character leaves the narrow corridor, the environment expands into a cobblestone plaza where rain begins to fall and the illuminated signage of the Quan Bank building becomes prominent. The scene then shifts toward the water, following the character along a wide promenade lined with benches and modern street lamps. Finally, the path transitions into a park-like setting with trees and a canal railing on the right, while a street of parked vehicles borders the left side.
